content.speakerText: Do you smoke or drink much?

options.text: I smoke two packs a day and drink whiskey daily.
I used to smoke, but I quit last year. I drink wine once a week.
I don't know what you mean by much.
I only eat healthy food and never sleep.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了 'used to' 表示过去习惯，'once a week' 表示适度饮酒，符合医生询问病史的语境。选项1过于极端，不符合常规健康披露；选项3回避问题，不礼貌；选项4与问题无关。

options.text: I have a headache every Monday.
Yeah, penicillin makes me break out. Otherwise, I'm good.
I don't remember my last doctor visit.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了口语化表达 'makes me break out' 准确描述过敏反应，符合医疗对话习惯。选项1是偶发症状，不是慢性病；选项3与过敏无关；选项4回避问题，不提供有效信息。

content.speakerText: Do you have any history of high blood pressure or diabetes?
content.speakerTextCn: 你有高血压或糖尿病的病史吗？

options.text: I eat a lot of sugar, so maybe.
I was diagnosed with high blood pressure five years ago, but it's under control now.
My mom has diabetes, but I'm fine.
I don't know what those words mean.

content.explanation: 正确答案明确陈述了病史、诊断时间和当前控制情况，是完整且专业的回应。选项1是猜测，不准确；选项3提到家族史，但未说明自身状况；选项4拒绝沟通，不符合医疗场景。

content.template: I ______ to smoke, but I quit last year.
content.hint: 表达过去习惯但已停止的常用结构
content.knowledgePoint: used to do（过去习惯表达）

content.hint: 常见的药物过敏原，对话中提到的关键词汇
content.knowledgePoint: 常见过敏原词汇（医疗场景高频词）

content.template: I ______ drink alcohol — just once in a while.
content.hint: 表示‘很少’喝酒的副词，语气礼貌且准确
content.knowledgePoint: 频率副词在健康陈述中的使用（rarely）

content.speakerText: Do you smoke or drink much?
expectedAnswers: I don't smoke. I have a glass of wine on weekends.
I used to smoke, but I quit two years ago. I rarely drink — maybe once a month.
Nah, I'm not a smoker. I only have a beer when I'm out with friends.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回答了是否吸烟和饮酒
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的时态和频率副词
表达自然度：使用了口语化表达如 'Nah' 或 'a glass of wine'，符合日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：包含 'smoke', 'drink', 'quit', 'weekends/monthly' 等场景关键词

expectedAnswers: I'm allergic to peanuts. No chronic conditions.
Yes, I get rashes from penicillin — that's it.
I have asthma since childhood, but it's well-managed with medication.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰说明过敏原或慢性病情况
语言准确性：使用了正确术语如 'allergic to', 'chronic conditions', 'well-managed'
表达自然度：使用了口语化结构如 'that's it' 或 'I get rashes from'，不生硬
关键词覆盖：包含 'allergic', 'penicillin', 'asthma', 'chronic' 等核心医疗词汇

content.speakerText: How about your diet and exercise habits?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的饮食和运动习惯怎么样？
expectedAnswers: I try to eat vegetables every day and walk 30 minutes after dinner.
I don't exercise much, but I'm trying to start. I eat too much junk food, honestly.
I go to the gym three times a week and avoid sugary drinks.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整回应饮食和运动两个方面
语言准确性：使用了正确动词搭配如 'eat vegetables', 'go to the gym', 'avoid sugary drinks'
表达自然度：使用了口语表达如 'I'm trying to', 'honestly', 'not much'，符合真实对话风格
关键词覆盖：包含 'diet', 'exercise', 'vegetables', 'gym', 'junk food', 'sugary drinks' 等健康关键词
